fields.name: botToken
fields.description: Telegram bot token from BotFather. Falls back to TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN env var.

fields.name: mode
fields.description: Runtime mode: auto (default), webhook, or polling.

fields.name: secretToken
fields.description: Webhook secret token for x-telegram-bot-api-secret-token verification.

fields.name: userName
fields.description: Override bot username.

fields.name: apiBaseUrl
fields.description: Custom Telegram API base URL.

fields.name: botToken
fields.description: Bot token (xoxb-...). Required for single-workspace mode.

fields.name: botUserId
fields.description: Bot user ID (fetched automatically if omitted).

fields.name: signingSecret
fields.description: Signing secret for webhook verification.

fields.name: clientId
fields.description: Slack app client ID (required for OAuth / multi-workspace).

fields.name: clientSecret
fields.description: Slack app client secret (required for OAuth / multi-workspace).

fields.name: encryptionKey
fields.description: Base64-encoded 32-byte AES-256-GCM key for encrypting stored bot tokens.

fields.name: installationKeyPrefix
fields.description: State key prefix for workspace installations (default: slack:installation).

fields.name: userName
fields.description: Override bot username.

fields.name: botToken
fields.description: Discord bot token.

fields.name: applicationId
fields.description: Discord application ID.

fields.name: publicKey
fields.description: Application public key for webhook signature verification.

fields.name: mentionRoleIds
fields.description: Role IDs that trigger mention handlers (in addition to direct mentions).

fields.name: userName
fields.description: Override bot username.

fields.name: accessToken
fields.description: System User access token for WhatsApp Cloud API.

fields.name: phoneNumberId
fields.description: WhatsApp Business phone number ID.

fields.name: appSecret
fields.description: Meta App Secret for webhook HMAC-SHA256 signature verification.

fields.name: verifyToken
fields.description: Verify token for webhook challenge-response.

fields.name: apiVersion
fields.description: Meta Graph API version (default: v21.0).

fields.name: userName
fields.description: Bot display name.

fields.name: appId
fields.description: Microsoft App ID.

fields.name: appPassword
fields.description: Microsoft App Password.

fields.name: appTenantId
fields.description: Microsoft App Tenant ID.

fields.name: appType
fields.description: Microsoft App Type.

fields.name: userName
fields.description: Override bot username.

fields.name: credentials
fields.description: Service account credentials JSON string. Defaults to GOOGLE_CHAT_CREDENTIALS env var.

fields.name: useApplicationDefaultCredentials
fields.description: Use Application Default Credentials (ADC) instead of service account JSON.

fields.name: endpointUrl
fields.description: HTTP endpoint URL for button click actions. Required for HTTP endpoint apps.

fields.name: googleChatProjectNumber
fields.description: Google Cloud project number for verifying webhook JWTs. Defaults to GOOGLE_CHAT_PROJECT_NUMBER env var.

fields.name: impersonateUser
fields.description: User email for domain-wide delegation. Defaults to GOOGLE_CHAT_IMPERSONATE_USER env var.

fields.name: pubsubAudience
fields.description: Expected audience for Pub/Sub push JWT verification. Defaults to GOOGLE_CHAT_PUBSUB_AUDIENCE env var.

fields.name: userName
fields.description: Override bot username.

fields.name: allowFrom
fields.description: User IDs allowed to interact with this connection. Omit to allow all; empty array blocks all.

fields.name: allowGroups
fields.description: Whether group messages are allowed (default true).

fields.name: userConfigScopes
fields.description: Scopes that end users are allowed to customize. Empty = no restrictions.
